diff: Stage 1 becomes effective upon the execution of an Executive Vote implementing the activation of Stage 1. The Core Facilitator is authorized to include the activation of Stage 1 in the next available Executive Vote, and can do so directly without a prior Governance Poll. Relevant Ecosystem Actors must take all necessary actions to cooperate with the Core Facilitator in implementing Stage 1.
